blogPosts.title: Welcome to BharCode!
blogPosts.body: Hey guys! Welcome to my first website!

appCards.title: Sliqe
appCards.desc: A hyper-local, two-sided marketplace designed to eliminate urban food waste through dynamic pricing. To solve the notorious friction of F&B tech adoption, the platform features a streamlined 30-second vendor inventory portal. On the consumer side, a time-decay algorithm systematically drops surplus food prices as closing time approaches, driving impulse conversions via location-based push notifications.
appCards.tags: Product Strategy, UI/UX Design, Two-Sided Marketplace, Dynamic Pricing, MVP, Figma

about.headline:
Built by one CS student.
For $10 a year.
about.p1: I'm a computer science student in Singapore who got tired of waiting for the right moment to build something.
about.p2: The answer so far: yes, but it takes compounding.
about.p3: I started by launching a blog on GitHub Pages. Total cost: $10.35 for the domain.

appsFeature.title: Knot Bot (Telegram)
appsFeature.desc: The shared assistant for groups and couples. Track expenses, manage collaborative tasks, and settle balances instantly with PayNow integration. Designed to live in your group chat and keep everyone on the same page.
